# CWE-272 — Least Privilege Violation (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-272-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"syscall"
)

// Vulnerable: keeps elevated uid for the entire handler after chown.
func RepairOwnership(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	_ = syscall.Setuid(0)
	path := r.URL.Query().Get("file")
	if path == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing file", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	_ = os.Chown(path, 1000, 1000)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
